story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0100_10:
To this day, sync pairs with shining bonds
have continued to challenge themselves in
the Arceus Cup.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0200_10: Many have awakened their arc suit.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0300_10:
As Paldea’s Top Champion, I have a duty to
always aim higher.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0400_10:
Otherwise, I won’t inspire all those who
watch me.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0700_10: I must awaken my arc suit, too!
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0800_10:
Larry, you’ll be my opponent in the
Arceus Cup, won’t you?
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_0900_10:
Hmm... I’m afraid I don’t know how you
came to that conclusion.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1000_10:
If you’re hoping to join the Arceus Cup,
surely there are others who’d suit you better.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1100_10: Does that mean you have someone in mind?
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1500_10:
If you’re looking for someone to match your
skill, La Primera...how about Diantha, the
Kalos Champion?
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1600_10:
If I recall correctly, you haven’t had a
serious battle with her yet.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1800_10:
She certainly has a lovely shine, and many
Trainers admire her.
story_arceus_10_01000/2401_1001_1900_10:
She would indeed make a good Arceus Cup
opponent.
